name: Bean Bake
recipeIngredient: 1/4 to 1/2 cup brown sugar or to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
2. Drain the beans and pour them into a very large mixing bowl.
3. Mix the tomato sauce, chopped onion, prepared mustard, barbecue sauce, dry mustard, and brown sugar in a separate bowl.
4. Carefully stir the sauce mixture into the beans.
5. Pour the bean mixture into a large, oblong baking dish.
6. Bake for 1 hour. Serve hot or cold.
